title: ShinjiEoE is a lousy quitter discuss
display_title: ShinjiEoE is a lousy quitter discuss
wikitext:
[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Feb 15, 2007 7:11 am Mr. Tines wrote: @SSD AEF going in the right direction in his thinking. I did deliberately try to derail the thread away from the likely trajectory back into the ship vs anti-ship impasse, by letting rip with my profound disagreement with Yui's "everywhere can be heaven" assertion.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 15, 2007 11:36 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: It brings us to the question of just what does it take to find true happiness?

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Feb 15, 2007 11:57 am Mr. Tines wrote: Well, I'd say that part of the pursuit of happiness involves getting a good way up Maslow's hierarchy of needs .

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 15, 2007 12:12 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: To me, the point of NGE is we don't need false methods (HIP) to obtain happiness, we only need each other.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Feb 15, 2007 12:29 pm Mr. Tines wrote: AEF wrote: So you gonna tell that to Asuka, Misato, Ritsuko, and Gendo?

[]: Post by Szmitten » Thu Feb 15, 2007 12:34 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Maslow's hierarchy of needs .

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 15, 2007 12:42 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Was trying to screw Shinji fighting to the end?

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Feb 15, 2007 1:00 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Was trying to screw Shinji fighting to the end?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 15, 2007 1:07 pm @AEF We are on completely different planets. It's not even worth arguing the glaring mistakes and irrelevancies in your post. @All At this point I split this sub-thread off from the third page of "What Now in terms of Children 2 & 3...Post-3I thoughts!" and gave it its name.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Feb 15, 2007 2:04 pm Tines, everyone in the show screwed up. Asuka gave up! ep #23 wrote: Asuka: I don't care anymore.

[]: Post by BobBQ » Thu Feb 15, 2007 2:11 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: He got it together and went to the hanger.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Feb 15, 2007 2:15 pm Dude, the entry plug was covered in BAKELITE ! He couldn't get in it if he wanted to, which he did.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 15, 2007 2:18 pm @BobBQ -- thanks! Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Dude, the entry plug was covered in BAKELITE ! He couldn't get in it if he wanted to, which he did.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Feb 15, 2007 2:20 pm Oy, Yui didn't pick him up. He got in by his own free will. Yes he took a long time to get there, but others made the same mistake he did. If you want to level criticism, fine, all I ask is be fair and do it across the board.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 15, 2007 2:22 pm Episode 25' wrote: Shinji: But I can't get into the Eva... There's nothing I can do... (EVA-01 breaks free from the Bakelite and clutches at Shinji) Shinji: Mother!?

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Feb 15, 2007 2:26 pm Clutches at, not picks up. He was sitting there between her fingers looking at her after that.

[]: Post by Trigger's Elysium » Thu Feb 15, 2007 2:36 pm AND I QUOTE, MYSELF, LOL Trigger's Elysium wrote: Remember, we're all cool here, we're all fanboys of the same thing, we're just discussing junk, don't let the hate fly...>_>

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 15, 2007 2:56 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: He got in by his own free will.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Feb 15, 2007 3:08 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Between being a doll dragged around by Misato, and returned to the womb as a passenger in EVA-01, I see no plausibility that he suddenly had a few lucid moments and started doing anything for himself.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 15, 2007 3:15 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: So with her immense size she picked him up without crushing him...
